query:
SELECT 
  MONTH(dueDate) as mes,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN type='income' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as entradas,
  SUM(CASE WHEN type='expense' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as saidas,
  status
FROM transactions 
WHERE source = 'import_excel'
GROUP BY MONTH(dueDate), status
ORDER BY mes, status;

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_importado FROM transactions WHERE source = 'import_excel';
